_comment: Machine-readable RFC registry. Source of truth for RFC IDs, paired with each RFC's frontmatter and the Active RFCs table in README.md. Validator: scripts/em-rfc-validate.mjs. Drift between any two of (this file | frontmatter | README) is a CI failure.
